Summary: added an optional named `strip: Option<Str>` parameter to `Str::first` and `Str::last` in `crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs`, which trims matching characters from the start/end (via `trim_start_matches`/`trim_end_matches`) before grapheme extraction, falling back to unchanged behavior when omitted, and reusing the existing empty-string error.
